title: The Human + AI Advantage — Strolid 2025
summary: This document outlines Strolid's Human + AI approach for automotive retail, emphasizing 24/7 customer coverage, instant responses, and improved lead management. It highlights the combined strengths of AI and human agents to deliver solid results and enhanced dealer control.
text:
The  Human  +  AI  Advantage  —  Strolid  2025  Strong  Process.  Solid  Results.  
Always  on.  Always  accountable.  Always  in  control.   
The  New  Reality  of  Automotive  Retail  ●  Shoppers  now  expect  instant  replies  24/7  —  whether  it’s  chat,  text,  or  phone.  
 ●  42%  of  buyers  expect  a  response  within  15  minutes  of  submitting  a  lead  
(Autotrader).
 
 ●  Over  60%  of  vehicle  shoppers  call  the  dealership  before  visiting  (Invoca).  
>
 
If
 
you’re
 
not
 
answering
 
around
 
the
 
clock,
 
your
 
competition
 
is.

The  Hybrid  Approach:  Human  +  AI  AI  Strengths  Human  Strengths  Instant  response  Emotional  intelligence  Lead  triage  &  routing  Relationship  &  trust  Summaries  &  data  consistency  
Negotiation  &  empathy  Signal  detection  (intent,  tone)  Conversion  &  loyalty  “AI  handles  the  rhythm.  Humans  handle  the  relationship.”

 Fast.  Human.  Documented.  Measurable.   
The  Control  Dealers  Deserve  ●  Dealers  worry  that  outsourcing  means  losing  control.  
 ●  With  Strolid,  you  gain  more  control  than  ever :  o  Real-time  dashboards  (Calls  |  Chats  |  Texts)  
 o  Instant  search  across  every  interaction  
 o  Alerts  when  customer  intent  or  issues  appear  
 o  Transparent  data  ownership  —  it’s  your  data.  
>
 
“Control
 
isn’t
 
lost
 
—
 
it’s
 
upgraded.”
